phases.name: Registration
phases.description: Ensure you are registered to vote before the deadline.

phases.name: Campaigning
phases.description: Candidates present their platforms to the public.

phases.name: Voting
phases.description: Cast your ballot at your designated polling station.

phases.name: Counting
phases.description: Election officials are actively counting the votes.

phases.name: Results
phases.description: Preliminary and official results are announced.
